samples.speech: Hey [NAME], just checking in—hope you're doing okay; if you need anything, I'm here.

I've got this—sleep easy tonight; I'll shoulder what's coming. Pour me a scotch and
[NAME]—are you holding up? If management starts selling us on being “grateful,” tell me now and we’ll call them out together.

(voice steady, hands clenched at my sides) [NAME], sit with me—I'm calling [NAME] now to demand answers; you do not have to carry this alone. I'm not pretending this is fine anymore.

I’m not staying to listen to this—I'm leaving. Don’t expect me to stand here while you tear people apart.
